business.name: My Hero Appliance Repair
business.tagline: When your appliances quit, we don't

hero.headline: When your fridge dies at *dinner time*, we answer
hero.subheadline: Same-day fixes for Canton families who can't wait for parts to come in next week

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every appliance, one call
services_section.subheading: From ancient dishwashers to brand-new washers that shouldn't be broken yet

services.title: Refrigerator & Freezer Repair
services.description: Not cooling, leaking, or making weird noises? We diagnose the problem and fix it with the right parts.

services.title: Washer & Dryer Service
services.description: Won't spin, won't drain, or won't heat? We get your laundry routine back on track fast.

services.title: Dishwasher Fixes
services.description: Not cleaning, not draining, or leaving spots on everything? We handle all dishwasher issues.

services.title: Range & Oven Repair
services.description: Burners not heating, oven not baking right, or temperature all wrong? We fix cooking problems.

about.heading: The Canton appliance guy your neighbors call first
about.body: We're Aaron and the My Hero team — fixing appliances for Canton families who need things working today, not next week.

reviews.name: Sonia C.
reviews.text: Aaron was very kind and knowledgeable. Even though my fridge couldn't be fixed because parts aren't made anymore, he tried everything possible.

reviews.name: Barb J.
reviews.text: Very friendly and professional. Worked with me to find the most cost-efficient solution for my range problem. Will definitely use again.

reviews.name: Mikey F.
reviews.text: Showed up on time! Great prices, super friendly, very clean. Plan on him being our regular appliance repair guy.

cta.heading: Ready to get your appliances working again?
cta.body: Call us now for same-day service, or request your free quote online. We show up when we say we will.
